Off Calendar Aug-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RYAN ENGINEERING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION MOTION EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUT-OFF TO NOTICE DEPOSITION OF WILLIAM GILAMARTIN.
Appearances: R. Chad Hales of Cox Castle Nicholson (262.5158) for plaintiff and responding party; Ansel Kinney (no card provided) for defendant and moving party.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to extend discovery cut-off date granted. New discovery cut-off date will be September 2, 2011. Further, the court indicated it is for the sole purpose of this deposition. Order signed. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

Ryan Engineering Inc'S Motion For A Protective Order
Off Calendar Aug-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RYAN ENGINEERING INC'S MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's motion for protective order is denied. Plaintiffs will be allowed to depose attorney Kinney on non-privileged aspects of the negotiations (ie - what he was a percipient witness to, not his impressions, strategies, client communications). Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

Ryan Engineering Inc'S Motion For Protective Order
MINI MINUTES: RYAN ENGINEERING INC'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to 8/19/11 for moving party to file motion for protective order, in the clerk's office and provide courtesy copies to Department 302 pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B by 8/17/11. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (610)
